executable.title: Simple Threshold Filter
executable.description: Reads a 3D signed-short NIFTI image and applies a binary threshold filter. Pixels whose intensity lies in [lowThreshold, highThreshold] are set to insideValue; all other pixels are set to outsideValue. Output is written in NIFTI format. ECE:5490 HW04 — Partho Ghosh
executable.acknowledgements: Developed as part of ECE:5490 Multi-Dimensional Image Analysis Tools, Spring 2026, University of Iowa. Course instructor: Professor Hans Johnson. This work uses the Insight Toolkit (ITK), an open-source library for medical image analysis developed by the National Library of Medicine (NLM) and the Insight Software Consortium (ISC). Slicer Execution Model (SEM) developed by Kitware Inc. and the Slicer community (slicer.org). For understanding and help with the coding and writing Claude.ai has been used.

parameters.label: Threshold Parameters
parameters.description: Parameters controlling the binary threshold operation.

double.name: lowThreshold
double.description: Lower bound of the threshold range (inclusive). Pixels at or above this AND at or below highThreshold are set to insideValue.
double.label: Low Threshold

double.name: highThreshold
double.description: Upper bound of the threshold range (inclusive). Pixels at or below this AND at or above lowThreshold are set to insideValue.
double.label: High Threshold

double.name: outsideValue
double.description: Value assigned to pixels outside [lowThreshold, highThreshold].
double.label: Outside Value

double.name: insideValue
double.description: Value assigned to pixels inside [lowThreshold, highThreshold].
double.label: Inside Value

image.name: inputVolume
image.label: Input Volume
image.description: 3D signed-short NIFTI input image to be thresholded.
